description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a full wooden stock and a blued metal barrel. The stock and fore-end are made of polished wood, featuring a rich brown color and a smooth finish. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with the barrel being long and cylindrical, ending in a simple muzzle. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the lever-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever, providing a seamless transition between the two. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a full wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and a prominent lever loop beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metal receiver, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the wooden stock and metal barrel from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard integrated with the lever, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
